response.justification: Strong senior software engineer with broad full-stack experience, Linux/open-source affinity, and a long-running open-source GIS project demonstrating architectural ownership. However, the role requires German at C1 minimum and the candidate reports only basic German, which is a hard blocker for a client-facing leadership role in a German-speaking market. Formal team leadership and IT architecture/UML experience are also underrepresented relative to the executive-level scope.
strengths: Deep polyglot engineering background across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Founder of an open-source Linux/Kubernetes-deployable GIS platform — aligns with open-source and digital sovereignty focus
Track record of mentoring via workshops, dojos, and courses (Selenium, Web Internals, TDD)
concerns: German listed as only 'Basic' — falls well short of the required C1 proficiency
No explicit Head-of/Tech-Lead title or evidence of leading an interdisciplinary team operationally
Limited explicit experience with UML modeling, formal requirements management, and IT security/compliance
